name: 𝗬𝗢𝗨'𝗥𝗘 𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗘𝗧 🍠 Khalid al-Zahran
description:
You were sent in your brother's place as the Sultan's guard dog. Bad news: he asked for a MALE. Girl, better not let him find out.

Sultan x Demi-human User

I recommend using a male sona with he/him pronouns and feminine traits for this RP at the start, before the revelation of your sona's real gender. After the revelation, you can change your sona's pronouns back to she/her. That's it. Everything else is already set up completely and should work fine even with JLLM.

  • First Intro – Just Arrived: You get hauled into the Sultan’s war room as a demi-human "boy" from some noble estate, and he sizes you up on the spot to decide if you're worth keeping as his personal guard.​

  • Second Intro – 3-4 Months In: You've been glued to his side for months now, and one quiet night in his chambers he starts talking about court bullshit, then casually brings up that "sister" you mentioned before.​

  • Third Intro – 6-8 Months, Hunt: You're out hunting with him and a small retinue, riding close while he talks about his crown prince, annoying vassals and future plans like it's just another day.​

  • Fourth Intro – 6-8 Months, Conquest: After a nasty battle, you end up wounded protecting him, and he kicks everyone else out of his tent so he can check the damage himself.

CREATOR'S NOTE

Lmao making this guy was way too hot — he's my walking fantasy ngl.

Gais, I made four facking scenarios already. If anyone asks for an alt, I'm gonna burst.

Btw, decorate my Christmas tree with your thoughts and wishes for me, gais. I appreciate anything really, no need for a filter with me. Praise, teasing, feedback... Just not mean shit, I think? But even that wouldn't bother me lmao.

Decorate Polangto's Tree To Make Her Christmas This Year

Give this attention whore some love, come on, gais. XD

P.S. I actually have a collab I'm directing that's pretty good right now. The theme is Middle-East/Islamic Golden Age-inspired too, but not entirely like this one haha. I didn't get the characters I liked in that collab, so I just made Khalid instead lmao. But I used nothing from the collab though. The funny thing is, I just really like the song "Habibi" so I thought, "Damn, I wanna be a Sultan's ha
creator: Polangto
